time.h(3) Library Functions Manual time.h(3)

NAME

time.h - ⏱️ High-precision timing utilities using sokol_time.h and uthash

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct timer_record
Individual timer record for a named timing operation. struct adaptive_sleep_config_t
Configuration for adaptive sleep behavior. struct adaptive_sleep_state_t
Runtime state for adaptive sleep.

Macros


#define TIME_ATOMIC_UINT64 atomic_t
#define TIME_ATOMIC_UINT64_INIT(val)
#define NS_PER_US 1000.0
#define NS_PER_MS (1000.0 * NS_PER_US)
#define NS_PER_SEC (1000.0 * NS_PER_MS)
#define NS_PER_MIN (60.0 * NS_PER_SEC)
#define NS_PER_HOUR (60.0 * NS_PER_MIN)
#define NS_PER_DAY (24.0 * NS_PER_HOUR)
#define NS_PER_YEAR (365.25 * NS_PER_DAY)
#define NS_PER_US_INT 1000ULL
#define NS_PER_MS_INT (1000ULL * NS_PER_US_INT)
#define NS_PER_SEC_INT (1000ULL * NS_PER_MS_INT)
#define US_PER_MS_INT 1000ULL
#define US_PER_SEC_INT 1000000ULL
#define MS_PER_SEC_INT 1000ULL
#define SEC_PER_MIN 60ULL
#define SEC_PER_HOUR (SEC_PER_MIN * SEC_PER_MIN)
#define SEC_PER_DAY (24ULL * SEC_PER_HOUR)
#define NS_PER_MIN_INT (SEC_PER_MIN * NS_PER_SEC_INT)
#define NS_PER_HOUR_INT (SEC_PER_HOUR * NS_PER_SEC_INT)
#define NS_PER_DAY_INT (SEC_PER_DAY * NS_PER_SEC_INT)
#define START_TIMER(name_fmt, ...)
Start a timer with formatted name. #define START_TIMER_GLOBAL(name_fmt, ...)
Start a timer without thread ID (for cross-thread timers). #define STOP_TIMER_GLOBAL(name_fmt, ...)
Stop a cross-thread timer and return elapsed time. #define STOP_TIMER(name_fmt, ...)
Stop a timer with formatted name and return elapsed time. #define STOP_TIMER_AND_LOG(log_level, threshold_ns, timer_name, msg_fmt, ...)
Stop a timer and log the result with a custom message. #define STOP_TIMER_AND_LOG_EVERY(log_level, interval_ns, threshold_ns, timer_name, msg_fmt, ...)
Stop a timer and log the result with rate limiting.

Typedefs


typedef struct timer_record timer_record_t
Individual timer record for a named timing operation.

Functions


uint64_t time_get_ns (void)
Get current monotonic time in nanoseconds. uint64_t time_get_realtime_ns (void)
Get current wall-clock (real) time in nanoseconds. void time_sleep_ns (uint64_t ns)
Sleep for specified nanoseconds. uint64_t time_elapsed_ns (uint64_t start_ns, uint64_t end_ns)
Calculate elapsed time with wraparound safety. bool timer_system_init (void)
Initialize the timing system. void timer_system_destroy (void)
Cleanup the timing system. bool timer_start (const char *name)
Start a named timer. double timer_stop (const char *name)
Stop a named timer and return elapsed time. bool timer_is_initialized (void)
Check if timing system is initialized. int time_pretty (uint64_t nanoseconds, int decimals, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format nanoseconds as pretty duration with spaces and configurable precision. int time_pretty_now (int decimals, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format current monotonic time as pretty duration. int time_human_readable (int64_t nanoseconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format nanoseconds as human-readable relative duration (moment.js style). int time_human_readable_unsigned (uint64_t nanoseconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format elapsed time as human-readable relative duration (unsigned version). int time_human_readable_now (char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format current monotonic time as human-readable relative duration. int format_uptime_hms (int hours, int minutes, int seconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format uptime as HH:MM:SS string. void adaptive_sleep_init (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, const adaptive_sleep_config_t *config)
Initialize adaptive sleep state with configuration. uint64_t adaptive_sleep_calculate (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, size_t queue_depth, size_t target_depth)
Calculate adaptive sleep time based on queue depth. void adaptive_sleep_do (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, size_t queue_depth, size_t target_depth)
Calculate sleep time and immediately sleep for that duration. bool time_format_is_valid_strftime (const char *format_str)
Validate strftime format string against known safe specifiers. int time_format_now (const char *format_str, char *buf, size_t buf_size)
Format current time using strftime format string. asciichat_error_t time_format_safe (const char *format_str, char *buf, size_t buf_size)
Safe wrapper for time formatting with validation and error codes. uint64_t time_timespec_to_ns (const struct timespec *ts)
Convert struct timespec to nanoseconds. void time_ns_to_timespec (uint64_t ns, struct timespec *ts)
Convert nanoseconds to struct timespec.

Detailed Description

⏱️ High-precision timing utilities using sokol_time.h and uthash

Definition in file time.h.
